heading: Governing body
label: 230505 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)230505(a)36:3806., , §§ 6, 7, 8 (related to directors and officers), .May 23, 1986Pub. L. 99–318100 Stat. 475230505(b)36:3807.230505(c)36:3808 (related to directors and officers).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “Except as provided in ” are omitted because the prohibition on discrimination is restated in this section. children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: c .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for serving as a director or officer may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, disability, age, or national origin.
